item.title: Fresh(ish) Memes #406
item.dc:creator: ShaggyRoots

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1210 (brainfog)
item.description:
Bread. Whatever. I don't care.
I'm so tired of this timeline. No revolution, no Onion infowars. Just the boot. The boot, and the whip.
The Marketplace gives me no tax credit this year. So I'm going to have to pay 600 a month for insurance. The ACA Health plan I was on for some reason kicked me off of it. God fucking bless this shithole of a Protestant soul-sucking murderous octegenarian kaikostracy. The Line must go up so the CEOs and Shareholders can have their yachts and safety bunkers.
I make, on average, $2000 a month in a good month. Slightly over Half goes directly into rent. Then food, life insurance, gas for travel, etc. If I'm lucky, I get about $200-$400 left to play with, in a good month. $ I've cut all streaming services except Paramont from my life. About the only way I can save more is if I cancel my pet insurance for Pippin, and drastically decrease my food budget and subsist on rice and Ramen alone. No meat, no dairy, no healthy foods. I can't exactly skimp on Pippin in terms of his food and toys, that would be like depriving a child. Also, i guess cutting out all hobbies such as my mead making. That would probably give me an extra 130 a month I guess. Have to kiss saving up for the new computer and bronze-age sword goodbye. This is America. If it doesn't make the line go up and the CEOs and Oligarchs yacht money, it doesn't matter.
I mean, at least now I know there are... other options regarding insurance. For legal reasons, this is a joke.
Really feeling like Achilles right now. A ball of range and anger.
The meal, for some reason, is also $40.
Fam, I'm already failing the week challenge, spam F in the chat for your homie.
This would still have been a better timeline. I think I need to remember to live with the fact we are in the worst possible timeline, the worst possible universe. And if this is a simulation, buddy, I am going to find the plug and pull it so hard that we all see stars.
People do approach me randomly in the liquor isles.
Yeah, this is my pet dread cloud.
I might.
I could take dying of frostbite and poisoned tin cans of food. I mean, since existence is a pre-existing condition.
Doomed Holidays to you all.
I would like to be eaten by the Spider that devours the world.
Just aim for a part that kills, I won't have insurance to cover anything superficial.
@kaeldra I feel really gets the mood I'm in today. Also this meme is about poetry, so I'm tagging her
It's wild how badly translated Rumi actually is. Good lord.
Mood.
I can't afford hyperfixation in my budget anymore. I'll only have about $200 left to eat on, and no money for clothes, gas, and hobbies. All of my safe foods i enjoy are jumping up in price. Looks like it's going to be rice and Ramen for the rest of my life starting in January. Horray!
Honestly, posting memes is about the only thing keeping me going right now. Because I know there are many of you who do really see these posts as the highlight of your day. I can't let those people down.
Pippin tax.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Prince Rupert’s Drop vs Hydraulic Press
item.description: A **Prince Rupert’s Drop** is a fascinating physical phenomenon and a demonstration of the interplay between materials science and physics. It is a tadpole-shaped piece of glass created by dripping molten glass into cold water. Here’s how it works and what makes it extraordinary: ### **How it is Made:** 1. **Molten glass drop:** A drop of molten glass is allowed to fall into cold water. 2. **Rapid cooling:** The outer surface of the drop cools and solidifies almost instantly due to the cold water. 3. **Inner cooling:** The interior of the drop cools more slowly, creating tension between the outer and inner layers. ### **Properties:** 1. **Immense strength in the bulb:** The bulbous head of the drop is extremely strong. It can withstand significant forces, including hammer blows, without breaking. 2. **Fragility in the tail:** The thin, elongated tail of the drop is extremely fragile. If the tail is damaged or even slightly stressed, the entire drop will shatter explosively. ### **Why Does It Shatter?** - **Internal stress distribution:** The rapid cooling causes compressive stress in the outer layer and tensile stress in the inner layer. - **Triggering a fracture:** Any damage to the tail releases the stored internal energy, which propagates a crack through the structure at supersonic speeds, shattering the entire drop. ### **Scientific Importance:** 1. **Material strength and stress:** The Prince Rupert's Drop is used as a teaching tool to understand material strength and stress distribution in glass. 2. **Shockwave propagation:** The way the shattering occurs provides insights into shockwave behavior in brittle materials. ### **Historical Background:** The name comes from **Prince Rupert of the Rhine**, a 17th-century European nobleman who is believed to have introduced the phenomenon to England. These drops were popular curiosities among scientists and the public during that time. In essence, the Prince Rupert’s Drop is a perfect blend of simplicity and complexity, showcasing how extreme stress and material properties can coexist in a single object.
item.dc:creator: LosPer

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
man that looks good
must never watch rasslin'
as is tradition
don't kink shame
German sexual harassment is more efficient
and the problem is?
seems about right
i don't know when dude works
mmm hmm
no
we've all been there
wait what
i have no idea what this means
hurry
these all offer incredible things
hello mr. pretzel
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Images of Note: Obsession with a large heavy ball
item.description:
I had pizza yesterday :)
mood
mood
:D
THIS IS A HATE CRIME. LET ME SIT IN MY ROOM IN THE DARK! THIS WAS A CHOICE I MADE. NO IT'S NOT BETTER. WHY ARE MY LIGHTS PURPLE? IT'S EASIER ON MY EYES. FUCK YOU.
s p l o o s h
Because raging over vegans and transgender people is far more important than who's fucking everyone over.
ow0
D:
yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes
j e f f
yes
:D
UwU
I CAN GO SEE THE SQUIRRELS AT THE BOTANICS!!!
Alas he was caught and he was caught because someone at McDonalds snitched
